conceptual_metaphor.prompt_template: Create a {aspect_ratio} editorial composition illustrating {main_metaphor}. Subject state: {subject_state}. Visual flow: {visual_flow}. Reserve clean negative space at {reserved_text_zones}. Include only these subtle audience-native cues: {micro_semiotic_anchors}. Follow this visual constitution: {style_constitution}. No final words, labels, logos, or watermarks.

cartoon_moral.prompt_template: Create a clean editorial cartoon scene that visually communicates {moral_mechanism}. Character action: {character_action}. Hero object: {hero_object}. Reserve the top zone for deterministic headline rendering. Use {brand_character_style}. Add one subtle recognition cue: {msa}. No written text.

cartoon_framework.prompt_template: Generate panel {panel_index} of {panel_count} for a coherent editorial cartoon framework. Scene: {panel_scene}. Keep the same character design, lens, palette, and line style as reference. No text, labels, panel borders, or numbering.

comparison_poll.prompt_template: Generate a matched comparison asset for option {option_label}: {option_scene}. Match the companion option in camera, scale, lighting, style, and visual complexity. Do not add text, borders, badges, or labels.

assertion_commentary.prompt_template: Create a single clean hero visual for the claim theme {hero_scene}. Subject pose: {subject_pose}. Leave the declared headline zone empty. Follow {style_constitution}. No text.

documentary_social_card.reason: Use sourced screenshots, verified photos, and deterministic shells.

sports_collage.reason: Use verified source photography and deterministic stat composition.

promo_live.reason: Use approved portrait assets and deterministic metadata.
